mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, type, title, content, status, related_type AS relatedType, related_id AS relatedId, created_at AS createdAt, read_at AS readAt FROM system_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, type, title, content, status, related_type AS relatedType, related_id AS relatedId, created_at AS createdAt, read_at AS readAt FROM system_notification ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM system_notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
mapper.update: UPDATE system_notification SET status = 'READ', read_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
